meeting.title: Release readiness review
meeting.purpose: Assess whether the release has enough validation evidence without granting approval
agenda: Validation coverage and unresolved release risk

evidence.content: The smoke suite passed, but the backup restore rehearsal has not been observed on the target environment.

developer.responsibility: Assess implementation completeness and identify the smallest safe technical next step.
completionCriteria: Unknown runtime behavior is explicitly identified

qa.responsibility: Challenge release readiness using validation and recovery evidence.
completionCriteria: Release risk is stated with evidence
